what-the-terminal-is.label: Kisa tèminal la ye
what-the-terminal-is.summary: Understand the tèminal as a place pou type kòmands ak see the computer respond.

sketch0.title: Tèminal la se yon konvèsasyon ak òdinatè ou

sketch1.title: Kòmand yo se enstriksyon, epi rezilta a se repons lan

sketch2.title: Poukisa moun sèvi ak tèminal la

sc-terminal-purpose.title: Sa tèminal la fè
sc-terminal-purpose.prompt: Ou se helping organize a club espas travay avèk katabs ak fichyes. Ki best describes the tèminal?
sc-terminal-purpose.hint: Panse ak whether the tèminal se a place pou type instructions oswa a place that stores fichyes by itself.

help.concept: The tèminal se an interface for entering kòmands ak seeing the computer's responses. It se not the same thing as a katab, fichye, oswa operating system.
help.hint_1: Decide which choice describes interaction: ou type something, ak the computer responds.
help.hint_2: Chèche the option that describes a text-based tool for running kòmands.

options.a: A text-based place pou type kòmands ak see the computer respond
options.b: A katab that automatically stores every fichye ou kreye
options.c: A special fichye that liss all kòmands on the computer
options.d: A background process that runs san user input

sc-pwd-vs-ls.title: Chwazi bon objektif kòmand lan
sc-pwd-vs-ls.prompt: Yon elèv types a kòmand because they want pou know which katab they se currently nan anvan lising fichyes. Ki kòmand matches that objektif?
sc-pwd-vs-ls.hint: Sèvi ak eksplikasyon leson an ak fason kesyon an ekri pou diminye chwa yo.

help.concept: Tèks èd sa a te korije paske premye vèsyon an te montre repons lan twò dirèkteman.
help.hint_1: Compare the question pou the lesson example ak redeplase details that fè not match the requested concept.
help.hint_2: Sèvi ak wòl oswa prèv ki nan enstriksyon an olye ou konte sèlman sou mo ki nan repons yo.

mc-terminal-workflow.title: Sa ki dwe antre nan yon fason travay debaz nan tèminal
mc-terminal-workflow.prompt: Choose all actions that fit the idea of using the tèminal pou enspekte a espas travay an sekiritely at the start of a task.
mc-terminal-workflow.hint: Panse ak kòmands that help ou tcheke ou kote ak see what se nan the katab aktyèl la.

help.concept: Early tèminal workflow often starts avèk enspekteion kòmands such as `pwd` ak `ls` so ou understand ou current kote ak kontni anvan making changes.
help.hint_1: Chèche actions that help ou orient yourself anvan kreye, moving, oswa deleting anything.
help.hint_2: Two of these choices se direct tchekes: one montres ou katab aktyèl la ak one liss items nan it.

options.a: Kouri `pwd` pou konfime the katab aktyèl la
options.b: Kouri `ls` pou see fichyes ak katabs nan the current kote
options.c: Sèvi ak `sudo` pou get full control anvan tchekeing anything
options.d: Install a package so the tèminal can montre katab names

dr-terminal-check-sequence.title: Mete yon tchek tèminal senp nan lòd
dr-terminal-check-sequence.prompt: Mete sa yo etaps nan pi bon order for a débutan who opens the tèminal ak wants pou understand the espas travay anvan doing anything else.
dr-terminal-check-sequence.hint: Li chak moso epi mete yo nan lòd pou deklarasyon an ka byen konprann.

help.concept: Moso yo dwe fòme yon deklarasyon ki valab nan yon lòd ki lojik.
help.hint_1: Kòmanse ak moso ki prezante lide a oswa aksyon an.
help.hint_2: Mete moso ki depann yo apre pati yo dekri oswa konplete a.

fb-pwd-meaning.title: Konplete sans kòmand lan
fb-pwd-meaning.prompt: Ranpli kòmand ki manke a for this situation: ou want the tèminal pou montre ou katab aktyèl la kote.
fb-pwd-meaning.hint: Choose the kòmand that enprime the repètwa travay la.

help.concept: `the missing term` se the kòmand used pou display the current repètwa travay la nan the tèminal.
help.hint_1: This kòmand se short for print repètwa travay la.
help.hint_2: It se the kòmand ou use when ou want the tèminal pou answer “Where am I?”

fb-pwd-meaning.template: To montre ou katab aktyèl la kote, type `[blank1]`.

fb-ls-purpose.title: Konplete objektif kòmand lan
fb-ls-purpose.prompt: Ranpli kòmand ki manke a for this situation: ou se inside a project katab ak want pou see the names of fichyes ak katabs there.
fb-ls-purpose.hint: Chwazi kòmand that liss items nan the repètwa aktyèl la.

help.concept: `the missing term` liss the kontni of the repètwa aktyèl la, such as fichyes ak katabs.
help.hint_1: This kòmand helps ou answer “Kisa here?”
help.hint_2: It se not the kòmand for montreing ou kote; li se the one for lising names.

fb-ls-purpose.template: To lis the names of fichyes ak katabs nan the repètwa aktyèl la, type `[blank1]`.

what-the-terminal-is-try-it-1.prompt: Ou fèk louvri a shared espas travay. Kouri `pwd` pou see where ou se starting.
what-the-terminal-is-try-it-1.title: Travay tèminal: kouri pwd

what-the-terminal-is-try-it-2.title: Travay tèminal: kouri ls
what-the-terminal-is-try-it-2.prompt: Take a quick look around. Kouri `ls` pou see what se nan the katab aktyèl la.

what-the-terminal-is-try-it-3.title: Travay tèminal: mande kote ak kisa
what-the-terminal-is-try-it-3.prompt: Before ou change anything, get oriented. Kouri `pwd`, then `ls`.

try_what_the_terminal_is_sketch0.title: Eseye li ou menm: kouri pwd
try_what_the_terminal_is_sketch0.prompt: Kouri `pwd` pou see ou katab aktyèl la.

try_what_the_terminal_is_sketch1.title: Eseye li ou menm: kouri ls
try_what_the_terminal_is_sketch1.prompt: Kouri `ls` pou lis what se nan the katab aktyèl la.

try_what_the_terminal_is_sketch2.title: Eseye li ou menm: kouri pwd apre sa ls
try_what_the_terminal_is_sketch2.prompt: Kouri `pwd`, then `ls`, pou see where ou se anvan ou start working.

terminal-basics.title: Tèminal la se yon konvèsasyon ak òdinatè ou
terminal-basics.bodyMarkdown:
The tèminal se a text-based place where ou **type kòmands** ak the computer **responds avèk rezilta**. Instead of clicking katabs ak buttons, ou tell the computer what pou fè avèk short instructions.

A kòmand usually has two parts:

1. the kòmand name
2. the rezilta the computer montres back pou you

For example:

```bash
pwd
```

If ou run `pwd`, the computer enprime ou current kote nan the espas travay. Line by line, here se what se happening:

- `pwd` se the kòmand ou type
- li stands for **print repètwa travay la**
- the tèminal responds by montreing the katab ou se currently in

Another example:

```bash
ls
```

- `ls` se the kòmand ou type
- li liss what se nan the katab aktyèl la
- the tèminal responds avèk fichye ak katab names

Imagine ou se helping organize a small project katab for a school club. In a fichye explorer, ou might click around pou see where ou are. In the tèminal, ou can ask directly avèk `pwd` ak `ls`. The tèminal se not magic—it se just a faster, text-based way pou enspekte ak control ou espas travay.

commands-and-output.title: Kòmand yo se enstriksyon, epi rezilta a se repons lan
commands-and-output.bodyMarkdown:
When ou use the tèminal, ou se giving the computer a specific instruction. The computer then montres a rezilta, often as text.

Here se a simple worked example:

```bash
ls
```

Suppose the katab aktyèl la contains two items named `notes.txt` ak `photos`. The tèminal rezilta might look like this:

```bash
notes.txt
photos
```

That means:

- ou typed `ls`
- the computer tchekeed the katab aktyèl la
- li printed the names of the items inside it

Now compare that with:

```bash
pwd
```

Possible rezilta:

```bash
/home/learner/project
```

This tells ou **where ou are**, not **what se inside**. That difference matters:

- `pwd` answers: “Ki katab am I in?”
- `ls` answers: “Kisa nan this katab?”

If ou se organizing a newsletter espas travay, `pwd` helps ou konfime ou se nan the `drafts` katab, while `ls` helps ou see whether fichyes like `intro.txt` oswa `outline.txt` se there.

why-terminal-matters.title: Poukisa moun sèvi ak tèminal la
why-terminal-matters.bodyMarkdown:
People use the tèminal because li gives clear, direct control over fichyes ak katabs. It se especially useful when ou want pou enspekte a espas travay quickly oswa repeat the same kinds of actions.

For a débutan, the most important idea se this: the tèminal helps ou **navigate** ak **enspekte** ou espas travay avèk kòmands.

Here se a short sequence:

```bash
pwd
ls
```

Step by etap:

- `pwd` montres ou katab aktyèl la
- `ls` montres what se inside that katab

Together, these kòmands help ou stay oriented.

Imagine ou se a junior assistant preparing katabs for an event team. You might need pou konfime that ou se inside `event-plan` anvan tchekeing whether `schedule.txt` ak `guests.txt` exist. In the tèminal, that workflow se quick ak precise.

The tèminal fè not replace thinking. You still decide what ou want pou enspekte oswa change. The tèminal se simply the tool that carries out ou kòmands ak reports back.
